architecture.summary: Load once + manual refresh. File list fetched on skill selection, cached in local state. Refresh button in file tree strip.

integrations.summary: N/A - no external integrations, 2 new internal API endpoints only

ui-ux.summary: Collapsible strip collapsed by default showing active file path. Pretty-printed JSON preview. Rendered markdown preview. Raw text for other files.

performance.summary: 1MB cap on file reads. 500KB display truncation with warning. History JSONs typically under 50KB.

security.summary: Path traversal protection on read endpoint. Serve any file type. Binary detection via null byte check in first 8KB.

edge-cases.summary: Reset to SKILL.md on skill navigation. File browser state local to current skill. Error message for unopenable files.
